title: . Non-abridgment of right to self-organization. It shall be unlawful for any person to restrain,
content:
. Non-abridgment of right to self-organization. It shall be unlawful for any person to restrain, 
coerce, discriminate against or unduly interfere with employees and workers in their exercise of the right to 
self-organization. Such right shall include the right to form, join, or assist labor organizations for the purpose of 
collective bargaining through representatives of their own choosing and to engage in lawful concerted 
activities for the same purpose for their mutual aid and protection, subject to the provisions of Article 264 of 
this Code. (As amended by Batas Pambansa Bilang 70, May 1, 1980) 
Title VI 
UNFAIR LABOR PRACTICES 
Chapter I 
CONCEPT
